description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She is dressed in a short, fitted dress with a V-shaped neckline and short sleeves, featuring a contrasting trim at the collar and cuffs. The figure wears high-heeled shoes and has a neat, high bun hairstyle. Her posture is balanced and symmetrical, with both feet firmly on the ground and her head facing forward. The model includes subtle anatomical details such as defined legs, arms, and facial features, and she appears to be accessorized with earrings and a bracelet. The overall appearance suggests a confident, urban pedestrian ready for a city environment.
description: A stylized adult woman in a short dress and high heels, standing upright with a high bun hairstyle and accessorized with earrings and a bracelet.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the dress, high bun hairstyle, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the dress, the high-heeled shoes, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the V-neckline, facial features, accessories, and symmetrical arm position.
description_view_3: Right profile view similar to the left, showing the side of the dress, shoes, and bun hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: short fitted dress with V-neckline and short sleeves, accessorized with earrings and a bracelet
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a high bun
